<item xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:slash="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/" xmlns:wfw="http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/" xmlns:wp9="com-wordpress:feed-additions:1">
		<title>Cyberpunk 2077 Library Edition Vol. 2 (TPB) (2026)</title>
		<link>https://getcomics.org/other-comics/cyberpunk-2077-library-edition-vol-2-tpb-2026/</link>
					<comments>https://getcomics.org/other-comics/cyberpunk-2077-library-edition-vol-2-tpb-2026/#respond</comments>
		
		<dc:creator>The Comic Guy</dc:creator>
		<pubDate>Tue, 26 May 2026 05:41:56 +0000</pubDate>
				<category>Other Comics</category>
		<category>Cyberpunk 2077</category>
		<category>Non 0-Day</category>
		<category>TPB</category>
		<guid isPermaLink="false" />

					<description><p>GetComics.info ~</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 2.9 GB</p>
<p>In XOXO, when love blooms in Night City it’s hard, fast, and bloody, especially when falling for a member of a rival gang. Then the action takes to the street as the daughter of a famed carjacker seeks to make a new name for herself in Kickdown. Finally, a MaxTac squad is divided when their new leader escalates to the extremes of their cyberpsycho opponents in Psycho Squad. Collects Cyberpunk 2077: XOXO #1–#4, Cyberpunk 2077: Kickdown #1–#4, and Cyberpunk 2077: Psycho Squad #1–#4, and features a cover gallery and expanded sketchbook section!</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/other-comics/cyberpunk-2077-library-edition-vol-2-tpb-2026/">Cyberpunk 2077 Library Edition Vol. 2 (TPB) (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
</description>
		
					<wfw:commentRss>https://getcomics.org/other-comics/cyberpunk-2077-library-edition-vol-2-tpb-2026/feed/</wfw:commentRss>
			<slash:comments>0</slash:comments>
		
		
		<wp9:post-id>397749</wp9:post-id>	</item>

		<link>https://getcomics.org/other-comics/cyberpunk-2077-chrome-3-2026/</link>

		<category>0-Day</category>

		<guid isPermaLink="false" />

					<description><p>GetComics.info ~</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 153 MB</p>
<p>The Scavengers have another plan for the left-over friends, but so does the mysterious killer . . . As each survivor’s part in this savage game of cat-and-mouse is decided, they’ll discover the true motives of those who roam the landfill and the everlasting horror that will remain.</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/other-comics/cyberpunk-2077-chrome-3-2026/">Cyberpunk 2077 &#8211; Chrome #3 (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
</description>
